steps.title: Identify the temporal context
steps.content: The passage describes the Akkadian Empire's reign from 2334 to 2154 BCE and uses past tense verbs for related actions: “was vital,” “reigned,” and “received.”

steps.title: Apply the tense consistency rule
steps.content: Verbs describing related actions in the same time period must maintain consistent tense. “Produced” is past tense and matches the historical narrative; the other three violate tense consistency by using non-past forms. This matches choice B — B is correct.
